decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Drift corrected: v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q, 'Why Did the Teetotal Captain Run? — Mary Celeste 1872') was stale SCHEDULED for 2026-06-15 but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200; controls: known-public y3xLIfOAPHA=200, bogus id=400). It auto-published on its 06-15 schedule without updating state — same publish-side drift class as the 06-13 batch. Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z. NOTE: Studio cross-check via mcp_stealth.py was NOT possible — mcphub endpoint returned HTTP 530 (origin down), so oEmbed was the sole verification path this run.

mcphub aggregator (https://mcphub.nocode18.com/mcp) returned HTTP 530 on initialize() — camoufox-stealth Studio session unreachable from the routine container. Any task step requiring live Studio interaction (schedule read-back, upload) cannot run until mcphub is back. Public-side checks (oEmbed) still work over plain HTTPS.

NOT a publish day today (Sun 06-21): 0 Shorts scheduled, no long-form scheduled. Next 3 days per runs/v4-roanoke/SHORTS_PLAN.md: Mon 06-22 = long-form ship 17:00 + v4_hook Short 12:00; Tue 06-23 = nothing; Wed 06-24 = v4_answer Short 12:00. SEVERE PIPELINE DRIFT: v4 Roanoke is still script-only (production steps 2-8 all pending since the 06-13 Flow blocker, +8 days). Long-form NOT rendered/uploaded/scheduled; neither v4 Short rendered/uploaded/scheduled. Unless v4 production is completed today, tomorrow's long-form ship + v4_hook Short WILL miss, and the entire upcoming publish week stays empty. Also: cadence target is long-form Sunday 17:00 — v4 plan slipped it to Monday 06-22, already off-cadence. When the long-form does ship, the r/UnresolvedMysteries seed (step 4) must be drafted that day.
